title: Insiders
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the anti-[[Yuuzhan Vong]] resistance force|''[[Star Wars Insider]]''}} {{Organization |image= |name=Insiders |type= |founder=*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' *[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] |leader= |subgroup= |headquarters=[[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] |locations= |formed=[[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|Combined Defense Forces of the New Republic]] |founded=[[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **Combined Defense Forces of the New Republic *[[New Jedi Order]] }} {{Quote|I'm proposing that it's time for a new Rebel Alliance. Something that's unbounded by the traditions and the shortsighted thinking of the current government of the New Republic. Something different.''"
"''A resistance force. But it would have to be a secret resistance. We can't just declare independence from the New Republic and march off to fight the Yuuzhan Vong. Secret units in hidden locations. Operations not discussed with the New Republic High Command.|Luke Skywalker and Wedge Antilles|}} The '''Insiders''' was an unofficial military unit within the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|Combined Defense Forces of the New Republic]] dedicated to stopping the spread of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and after the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|decline]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. ==History== In the wake of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]'s [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|sacking]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], remnants of the New Republic [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|military]] under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] retreated to the planet [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] to regroup with other loyalists, including members of the [[New Jedi Order|Jedi Order]]. During a meeting on Borleias between the highest ranking officials, the group abandoned their initial plan of searching for key Republic military personnel [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] and [[Traest Kre'fey]] when the sudden arrival of what was left of the Republic's [[New Republic Advisory Council|Advisory Council]] otherwise occupied them. Forced to negotiate with the Council, Antilles agreed to hold the planet against superior enemy numbers if [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Pwoe]], who had declared himself [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]], would agree to his conditions. Deeming the Advisory Council ineffectual and defunct after the agreement was struck, Antilles sought out [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] of the Jedi Order for advice. Suggesting that the Council should gently be subverted in order to perform more effectively, Skywalker recalled the fighting style of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and from these talks the Insiders were created. Subsequently, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], along with other members, set up resistance cells on a number of worlds without informing the Republic of their activities. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Insiders }} [[Category:New Republic military units]]
